name: cape_town_blue_downs
notes: Cape Town southeast growth corridor around Blue Downs and Kuils River, between the metro southeast and the Bottelary hills; a focus of the city's densification policy. Densities are indicative tiers (15/40/80 dwellings/ha at household 3.3). The Kuils River floodplain is unbuildable. Confirm against the municipal spatial development framework.
